title: July 22
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|July}}

'''July 22''' is the 203rd day (204th in leap years) of the year, with 162 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1938|1938]] – [[Terence Stamp]] is born.
*[[1950s#1959|1959]] – [[Nigel D. Findley]] is born.
*[[1960s#1962|1962]] – [[Rena Owen]] is born.
*[[1960s#1967|1967]] – [[Alex Fernandez]] is born.
*1967 – [[Dermot Power]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[James Arnold Taylor]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 40|''Star Wars'' (1977) 40]] published.
*[[1983]] – [[Polygon Pictures, Inc.]] is founded.
*[[1998]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – Redemption 1|''Tales of the Jedi – Redemption'' 1]] published.
*[[2003]] – ''[[Knights of the Old Republic: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]'' published.
*2004 – [[Star Wars Insider 77|''Star Wars Insider'' 77]] is released for subscribers.
*[[2007]] – [http://sv.starwars.wikia.com/wiki/Huvudsida Svenska Star Wars-wikin] founded.
*[[2008]] – [[Greg Burson]] dies.
*[[2009]] – [[Star Wars Omnibus: Menace Revealed|''Omnibus: Menace Revealed'']] published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: The Hunt for Grievous]]'' published.
*2010 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Secret Missions 2: Curse of the Black Hole Pirates]]'' published.
*[[2011]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Padawan Menace]]'' aired on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2014]] – ''[[Goodnight Darth Vader]]'' published.
*2014 – [[Star Wars Insider 151|''Star Wars Insider'' 151]] published.
*[[2015]] – [[Kanan 4|''Kanan'' 4]] published.
*2015 – Game Update 3.3: ''Grand Togruta Celebration'' for ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' released.
*[[2020]] – [[Star Wars: Jedi Temple Challenge - Episode 8|''Star Wars: Jedi Temple Challenge'' - Episode 8]] premieres on the [[StarWarsKids.com|Star Wars Kids YouTube channel]].
*2020 – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 2|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 2]] published.
*[[2025]] – ''[[Star Wars Modern Era Epic Collection: Yoda's Secret War]]'' published.
*2025 – ''[[Mace Windu: The Glass Abyss]]'' reprinted in paperback.
*2025 – ''[[The Mandalorian and Child 2026 Wall Calendar]]'' published.
<noinclude>
